title: The Supreme Court just worsened the Democrats's fundraising
abstract: The Supreme Court just dealt a blow to Democrats' fundraising efforts, making it seem like they've poured fuel on an already burning issue. What used to be a promising avenue for donations is now a roadblock. It's time to think outside the box—how will you navigate this new challenge?
abstract_zh: 你猜怎么着？最高法院又给民主党募捐添堵了，这次简直是“锦上添花”。本来民主党以为能好好筹点款，结果被这波操作直接打回原形。看来得找个新办法了，不然可就真是“屋漏偏逢连夜雨”了！——这次你准备怎么应对呢？
